query.description: Scope query to a specific process
Return the latest approved version of records. Records without any approved version will not be returned.
Response is formatted in JSON. This is default.
When using the "standard=ISA=95", enables support for tags in the integration mapping system

body.raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Recipe>
    <GeneralRecipe>
        <Header>
            <ProductID>A-mAb Case Study (DS/DP)</ProductID>
            <ProductName>A-mAb Case Study (DS/DP)</ProductName>
        </Header>
        <RecipeElement>
            <ID>Default Process</ID>
            <RecipeElementType>procedure</RecipeElementType>
            <RecipeElement>
                <ID>N-21 (Thaw)</ID>
                <RecipeElementType>unit_procedure</RecipeElementType>
                <Parameter>
                    <ID>Medium Equilibration Time</ID>
                    <Description>N/A </Description>
                    <ParameterType>ProcessParameter</ParameterType>
                    <Value>
                        <ValueString>1.0 </ValueString>
                        <UnitOfMeasure>Hours </UnitOfMeasure>
                        <Limit>
                            <LimitType>Recipe</LimitType>
                            <LoLimit>0.5</LoLimit>
                            <HiLimit>72.0</HiLimit>
                        </Limit>
                    </Value>
                </Parameter>
                <EquipmentElement>
                    <ID>1M Sodium Carbonate</ID> <!-- Unique identifier for this process element.
                    This will map to the name of the Material/Process Component in QbDVision.
                    (Required by QbDVision) -->
                    <Description>Titrant</Description> <!-- Description of the Material / Process
                    Component-->
                    <EquipmentElementType OtherValue="PRC">Other</EquipmentElementType> <!-- Type of
                    element Material/ Process Component, MT for material and PRC for process
                    component (Required by QbDVision)-->
                    <!-- Property objects to hold the properties of the Material/Process component,
                    Some of these objects are enums and have to hold a correct value from this enum
                    to be imported-->
                    <Property>
                        <ID>Use</ID> <!--This
                        field will map to the name of the property that needs to be added/modified
                        (Required by QbDVision)-->
                        <Description></Description>
                        <Value>
                            <ValueString>DS/DP</ValueString> <!-- This is the value of the property
                            (Required by QbDVision) -->
                            <UnitOfMeasure></UnitOfMeasure> <!-- This is going to be ignored by
                            QbDVision for Materials/Proces Components-->
                        </Value>
                    </Property>
                    <Property>
                        <ID>GMP</ID>
                        <Description></Description>
                        <Value>
                            <ValueString>false</ValueString>
                            <UnitOfMeasure></UnitOfMeasure>
                        </Value>
                    </Property>
                </EquipmentElement>
                <RecipeElement>
                    <ID>Equilibrate Media</ID>
                    <RecipeElementType>operation</RecipeElementType>
                    <Parameter>
                        <ID>Medium Equilibration Time2</ID>
                        <Description>N/A </Description>
                        <ParameterType>ProcessParameter</ParameterType>
                        <Value>
                            <ValueString>1.0 </ValueString>
                            <UnitOfMeasure>Hours </UnitOfMeasure>
                            <Limit>
                                <LimitType>Recipe</LimitType>
                                <LoLimit>0.5</LoLimit>
                                <HiLimit>72.0</HiLimit>
                            </Limit>
                        </Value>
                    </Parameter>
                    <EquipmentElement>
                        <ID>1M Sodium Carbonate2</ID> <!-- Unique identifier for this process
                        element. This will map to the name of the Material/Process Component in
                        QbDVision. (Required by QbDVision) -->
                        <Description>Titrant</Description> <!-- Description of the Material / Process
                        Component-->
                        <EquipmentElementType OtherValue="PRC">Other</EquipmentElementType> <!-- Type
                        of element Material/ Process Component, MT for material and PRC for process
                        component (Required by QbDVision)-->
                        <!-- Property objects to hold the properties of the Material/Process
                        component, Some of these objects are enums and have to hold a correct value
                        from this enum to be imported-->
                        <Property>
                            <ID>Use</ID> <!--This
                            field will map to the name of the property that needs to be
                            added/modified (Required by QbDVision)-->
                            <Description></Description>
                            <Value>
                                <ValueString>DS/DP</ValueString> <!-- This is the value of the
                                property (Required by QbDVision) -->
                                <UnitOfMeasure></UnitOfMeasure> <!-- This is going to be ignored by
                                QbDVision for Materials/Proces Components-->
                            </Value>
                        </Property>
                        <Property>
                            <ID>GMP</ID>
                            <Description></Description>
                            <Value>
                                <ValueString>false</ValueString>
                                <UnitOfMeasure></UnitOfMeasure>
                            </Value>
                        </Property>
                    </EquipmentElement>
                </RecipeElement>
            </RecipeElement>
        </RecipeElement>
    </GeneralRecipe>
</Recipe>

query.description: Returns latest approved version. If no approved version exists, returns current draft.
Includes all the versions for the retrieved record.
